summary: Incoming Inventory Queue feature testing complete. All backend APIs verified working (14/14 pytest tests pass). Frontend page accessible to accountant with all 4 classification types working. Fixed a frontend bug where SelectItem with empty string value caused runtime error.

ui_bugs.issue: SelectItem with empty string value caused 'Uncaught runtime errors' - FIXED

issues: Minor: Missing aria-describedby for DialogContent (accessibility warning only)

seed_data_creation: Created multiple test queue entries during testing (TEST-TRACK-*, TEST-REPAIR-YARD-*, GATE-SCAN-TEST-*, TEST-SCRAP-*)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Incoming Queue feature fully verified. Test data: MG-TEST-001 SKU stock is now 56 (increased from 48 due to test classifications). Firm ID for MuscleGrid Pvt Ltd: c715c1b7-aca3-4100-8b00-4f711a729829. SKU ID for MG-TEST-001: feb88b5c-4484-4f81-9e86-768335943785.

backend_apis.GET /api/incoming-queue: PASS - Returns list of queue entries

features_verified.gate_scan_creates_queue_entry: PASS - Inward gate scan creates pending queue entry instead of direct stock impact
features_verified.return_inventory_classification: PASS - Creates return_in ledger entry and increases stock

repair_yard_classification.mandatory_reason_validation: PASS - Returns 400 if reason not provided
repair_yard_classification.with_reason: PASS - Creates repair_yard_in ledger entry and increases stock

features_verified.scrap_classification: PASS - No stock impact, creates audit log
features_verified.duplicate_processing_prevention: PASS - Returns 400 'This entry has already been processed'
features_verified.accountant_access: PASS - Accountant can access all queue endpoints

frontend_page.page_loads: PASS - Incoming Inventory Queue page accessible
frontend_page.stats_cards: PASS - Shows Pending, Processed, Returns Added, Repair Yard Added
frontend_page.pending_tab: PASS - Shows pending items with Classify button
frontend_page.processed_tab: PASS - Shows processed items with classification details
frontend_page.classification_dialog: PASS - All 4 classification type options visible

bug_fixed.issue: SelectItem with empty string value in Original Dispatch dropdown caused runtime error
bug_fixed.fix: Changed SelectItem value from '' to 'none' and updated onValueChange handler to convert 'none' back to empty string
